title: Create & Not Much More
description: A mod for those who like to keep things simple, with Create being the main focus.
body:
Do you enjoy Create? Do you want to focus solely on Create?

This is the problem I have had with other mod packs. You will have Create, but also a bunch of add-ons, and possibly just as many other mods which add more to the game than you really want to play with.

This pack includes just 5 mods which add content you can interact with:
* Create
* Farmer's Delight
* Straw Statues
* Sophisticated Backpacks
* Friends & Foes

The rest of the mods included are purely for performance and quality of life.

I wanted a pack that's so basic, that there isn't even a minimap mod! This pack is simply for those who want to build as if it were vanilla, but have access to the goodies which Create offers. Along with a few extra things to spice up your world, and make caving less of a back-and-forth game.
